violations.text: The bar does not have a hand-washing sink that is conveniently located and/or readily accessible. Hand-washing sinks must be located to allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and ware-washing areas. Establishment is to send photo to RIDOH inspector was installed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025

The chlorine concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). The concentration of chlorine in the sanitizing solution must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment obtained chlorine sanitizer. Establishment was instructed on proper wash rinse and sanitize procedures. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment must have machine serviced and obtain, chemical detergents and sanitizer. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the three bay. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
